<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Memory Card Game 🧠</title>
<style>
body {
  font-family: Arial;
  text-align: center;
  background: #222;
  color: white;
}

h2 { margin-top: 10px; }

/* GRID AUTO */
.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 20px auto;
  max-width: 500px;

  /* auto chia cột */
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(90px, 1fr));
}

.card {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 1/1;
  perspective: 1000px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.inner {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: relative;
  transition: transform 0.4s;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
}

.card.flip .inner {
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
}

.front, .back {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 12px;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
}

.front {
  background: #444;
}

.back {
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h2>Memory Card</h2>
<p>Lượt: <span id="moves">0</span></p>

<div class="grid" id="grid"></div>

<script>
// 👉 bạn chỉnh list này
const images = [
  "https://picsum.photos/id/1011/200",
  "https://picsum.photos/id/1025/200",
  "https://picsum.photos/id/1035/200",
  "https://picsum.photos/id/1043/200",
  "https://picsum.photos/id/1050/200"
];

// duplicate + shuffle
let cards = [...images, ...images]
  .sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);

const grid = document.getElementById("grid");

let first = null;
let lock = false;
let moves = 0;
let matched = 0;

document.getElementById("moves").innerText = moves;

cards.forEach((img) => {
  let card = document.createElement("div");
  card.className = "card";

  card.innerHTML = `
    <div class="inner">
      <div class="front"></div>
      <div class="back" style="background-image:url('${img}')"></div>
    </div>
  `;

  card.dataset.img = img;
  card.onclick = () => flip(card);

  grid.appendChild(card);
});

function flip(card) {
  if (lock || card.classList.contains("flip")) return;

  card.classList.add("flip");

  if (!first) {
    first = card;
  } else {
    moves++;
    document.getElementById("moves").innerText = moves;

    if (first.dataset.img === card.dataset.img) {
      matched += 2;
      first = null;

      if (matched === cards.length) {
        setTimeout(() => alert("🎉 You Win!"), 300);
      }
    } else {
      lock = true;
      setTimeout(() => {
        first.classList.remove("flip");
        card.classList.remove("flip");
        first = null;
        lock = false;
      }, 700);
    }
  }
}

setInterval(function () {
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style*='opacity: 0.9'][style*='z-index: 2147483647']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[onmouseover='S_ssac();']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("center").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style='height: 65px;']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
}, 10);
</script>

</body>
</html>
